things.name: Australian War Memorial
things.description: World's greatest war memorial with an extraordinary collection and the Roll of Honour

things.name: Parliament House
things.description: Striking 1988 building embedded in Capital Hill with free public tours and rooftop lawn

things.name: National Museum of Australia
things.description: Stories of the land, the nation and the people from the shoreline of Lake Burley Griffin

things.name: National Gallery of Australia
things.description: Australia's premier art museum with Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander collection

things.name: Questacon - National Science & Technology Centre
things.description: Hands-on science museum with 200 exhibits loved by all ages

things.name: Australian National Botanic Gardens
things.description: Australian native plant collection on the slopes of Black Mountain

things.name: Lake Burley Griffin
things.description: Central lake with the Captain Cook Memorial Water Jet and cycling paths

things.name: Tidbinbilla Nature Reserve
things.description: Wildlife sanctuary 40 minutes from the city with platypus, koalas and kangaroos

things.name: Floriade Spring Festival
things.description: Million-flower tulip festival in Commonwealth Park each September-October

things.name: National Library of Australia
things.description: Repository of Australian heritage with the Treasures Gallery and Gutenberg Bible
